calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-25-2010 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-22-2010 Continued To Mar-08-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Greer Smith for Curtis Evans. Glenn Morgan also present.

Ms. Greer stated that all of the Beneficiaries were in Court today, presented a copy of the release of claim, stated that all of the Beneficiaries contracted with M & M for loans and that the Creditor's Claim was for payment of the mortgages. Mr. Glenn Morgan was sworn in and stated that he had not filed any law suits anywhere. The Court requested something from Discover stating that Information Services has authority to act on their behalf. The matter was continued to March 8, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Sum.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-09-2010 Continued To Feb-22-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-13-2009 Granted Per Written Order
